title: BEM-847 parse evidence
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/protocols']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 21:39 (UTC+3)'
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
real=[]; blockers=[]
d=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt')
if d.exists():
    for p in sorted(d.glob('*')):
        if p.is_file():
            txt=read(p); up=txt.upper(); low=(p.name+' '+txt).lower()
            bad='NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL' in up or 'RUNTIME BLOCKER' in up or 'not treat this as claude' in low
            ok=('DECISION:' in up and ('APPROVED' in up or 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up or 'BLOCKED' in up) and ('CLAUDE RESPONSE' in up or 'Claude Internal Auditor' in txt))
            if bad: blockers.append({'path':str(p),'preview':txt[:700]})
            elif ok: real.append({'path':str(p),'preview':txt[:1400]})
if real:
    status='real_response_evidence_present_protocol_can_advance'
    decision='evidence_present'
    next_action='promote BEM846 protocol to v1.0 after operator review or if autonomous gate allows'
else:
    status='real_response_evidence_missing_protocol_remains_draft'
    decision='blocked'
    next_action='continue Claude runtime/response repair; do not call protocol fully agreed'
protocol=Path('governance/protocols/BEM847_PROTOCOL_EVIDENCE_STATUS.md')
protocol.write_text('# BEM-847 | Protocol Evidence Status'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+sep+'Real responses found: '+str(len(real))+sep+'Blocker files found: '+str(len(blockers))+sep+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep+sep+'## Real response evidence'+sep+json.dumps(real[-5:],indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep+sep+'## Blocker files ignored'+sep+json.dumps(blockers[-5:],indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={'bem':'BEM-847','status':status,'real_response_count':len(real),'blocker_count':len(blockers),'real_responses':real[-5:],'blockers_ignored':blockers[-5:],'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem847_parse_response_evidence_for_protocol.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem847_parse_response_evidence_for_protocol.md').write_text('# BEM-847 | Parse Response Evidence For Protocol | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem847_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-847'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(protocol),'governance/state/bem847_parse_response_evidence_for_protocol.json','governance/reports/bem847_parse_response_evidence_for_protocol.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem847_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Parsed real Claude response evidence for protocol promotion and recorded whether the human-readable protocol remains draft or can advance')
"""
No issue comments.
